personal.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience in distributed systems and web applications.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Design and maintain payment processing microservices handling 50K+ requests/sec in Go, achieving 99.99% uptime SLA.
Led migration of a monolithic billing service to an event-driven architecture using Kafka, reducing P99 latency by 40%.
Built internal dashboard with React and TypeScript for real-time transaction monitoring, adopted by 200+ engineers.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through onboarding and code review processes.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Developed a GraphQL API layer for the merchant analytics platform, improving query performance by 3x over REST endpoints.
Implemented caching strategy with Redis that reduced database load by 35% during peak traffic periods.
Contributed to the checkout optimization team, shipping A/B test features that increased conversion rate by 2.1%.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Built a customer-facing SaaS dashboard from scratch using Next.js and PostgreSQL, serving 5K+ monthly active users.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs with Node.js/Express, handling 10K+ daily API calls with <200ms response time.
Set up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker, reducing deployment time from 45 min to 8 min.
Collaborated with product and design teams in weekly sprint cycles to ship 15+ features over 12 months.

items.title: httpbench (Open Source CLI Tool)
items.description: Go-based HTTP benchmarking CLI with concurrent workers, latency histograms, and percentile reporting. 800+ GitHub stars.

items.title: react-table-kit (Component Library)
items.description: Published npm package for accessible, sortable, and filterable data tables in React. 2K+ weekly downloads.

items.title: MediSync (Hackathon — 1st Place, CalHacks 2021)
items.description: Real-time patient triage system using WebSockets and ML-based priority scoring. Built in 36 hours with a team of 4.
